publishedAbstract: * The following alert is seen after upgrading OCP to 4.4 or deploying a fresh OCS 4.x cluster on OCP 4.4 for `noobaa-endpoint` HPA `openshift-storage/noobaa-endpoint` has been running at max replicas for longer than 15 minutes.
publishedTitle: 'KubeHpaMaxedOut' alert are continuously firing for 'noobaa-endpoint' when OCS 4.x is deployed on OCP v4.4 or above.
